title: Celestial Pixelmon
description: Official Pixelmon modpack for the Celestial Pixelmon Network!
body:
Server IP: jogar.celestialpixelmon.com Discord: https://discord.gg/VX5Wzfc9pX Site: https://www.celestialpixelmon.com

Welcome to Celestial Pixelmon! We are a server with a different feel! Come and have fun for hours playing the real Pixelmon, which reminds you of the true essence of games.

Pixelmon, powered by: https://pixelmonmod.com/
